name: logic_tra_xe_linh_kien
content:
w_idW_x_idX = [["X1",0,12], ["X2",0,12], ["X3",0,12]]
sai_so_goc = 3
ten_diem_w = ""
lay_xe_linh_kien = "run"
# kiem_tra_ha_xe = None
goc_can_xoay = None


def normalize_angle_90(angle):
    """
    Chuẩn hóa một góc về khoảng [-90, 90] độ.
    Ví dụ: 100 -> -80, -100 -> 80.
    """
    # Dùng toán tử modulo để đưa góc về [0, 360)
    angle = angle % 360
    # Chuyển từ [0, 360) về [-180, 180)
    if angle > 180:
        angle -= 360
    # Chuyển từ [-180, 180) về [-90, 90)
    if angle > 90:
        angle -= 180
    elif angle < -90:
        angle += 180
    return angle

def normalize_angle(angle):
    """
    Chuẩn hóa một góc về khoảng [-180, 180] độ.
    """
    # Dùng toán tử modulo để đưa góc về [0, 360)
    angle = angle % 360
    # Chuyển từ [0, 360) về [-180, 180)
    if angle >= 180:
        angle -= 360
    return angle
    
# print("goc_gav", goc_agv) # từ 0 đến 360
# goc_xoay_buoc_1 = normalize_angle(goc_agv)
# print("goc_xoay_buoc_1", goc_xoay_buoc_1)
if "cac_buoc_tra_xe" not in bien_nho:
    bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] = "buoc_1"

print("ooo", yeu_cau_gui_agv, diem_tiep_theo, diem_vua_di_qua, goc_agv, normalize_angle_90(goc_agv), xy_lanh, bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"],da_den_diem_tiep_theo)
if yeu_cau_gui_agv == "tra_xe_linh_kien":
    if diem_tiep_theo != "" and diem_vua_di_qua != "":
        if list(diem_tiep_theo)[0] == "W" and list(diem_vua_di_qua)[0] != "X" and bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] == "buoc_1" and da_den_diem_tiep_theo == True:
            goc_xoay_buoc_1 = 90
            if normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) > (90 - sai_so_goc) and normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) < (90 + sai_so_goc):
                if xy_lanh != "ha":
                    nang_ha_xe("ha")
                    print("ha_buoc_1------------")
                else:
                    bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] = "buoc_2"
                    bien_nho["goc_buoc_1"] = normalize_angle_90(goc_agv)
            else:
                xoay_goc(90, 0)
        #         print("xoay_buoc_1_0000000000")
        # print(bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] == "buoc_2" , xy_lanh == "ha" , "goc_buoc_1" in bien_nho)
        if bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] == "buoc_2" and xy_lanh == "ha" and "goc_buoc_1" in bien_nho:
            goc_xoay_buoc_2 = 0
            goc_min = (normalize_angle_90(goc_xoay_buoc_2) - sai_so_goc)
            goc_max = (normalize_angle_90(goc_xoay_buoc_2) + sai_so_goc)
            # print("kkkkk", normalize_angle_90(goc_agv), goc_min, goc_max, goc_xoay_buoc_2)
            if -normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) > goc_min and -normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) < goc_max:
                if xy_lanh != "nang":
                    nang_ha_xe("nang")
                    print("nang_buoc_2")
            else:
                xoay_goc(goc_xoay_buoc_2, 0)
                # print("xoay_buoc_2")
        if bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] == "buoc_2" and xy_lanh == "nang":
            bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] = "buoc_3"
        
        if list(diem_tiep_theo)[0] == "X" and list(diem_vua_di_qua)[0] != "W" and bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] == "buoc_3":
            goc_xoay_buoc_3 = 0
            goc_min = -sai_so_goc
            goc_max = sai_so_goc
            # print("kkkkk", normalize_angle_90(goc_agv), goc_min, goc_max, goc_xoay_buoc_2)
            if normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) > goc_min and normalize_angle_90(goc_agv) < goc_max:
                if xy_lanh != "ha":
                    nang_ha_xe("ha")
                    
                    print("ha_xe_3---------------")
                else:
                    bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] = "buoc_1"
            else:
                xoay_goc(goc_xoay_buoc_3, 0)
                print("xoay_buoc_3")
else:
    bien_nho["cac_buoc_tra_xe"] = "buoc_1"
